title: Tournament Name
body: Pick a name participants will recognize. Use the regenerate button for a random suggestion if you are stuck.

title: URL Slug
body: Creates the direct link to your tournament (ht-120min.com/t/your-slug). Generated automatically from the name, but you can adjust it.

title: Tournament Gender
body: Regular league for male teams, or Hattrick Femme International (HFI) for female teams. Only eligible teams can join.

title: Registration Type
body: Hattrick Validated: managers join and register their own teams automatically. Organizer-Managed: you add participants yourself — useful for tournaments organized via the Hattrick forum.

title: Scoring Mode
body: 120 minute achievements are unique to HT-120min — standings rank teams by how many 120-minute games they have achieved. Regular 90-minute mode uses standard 3/1/0 points.

title: Private Tournament
body: Marks the tournament as unlisted. It will not appear on the home page, but anyone with the link can still join.

title: League Restriction
body: Optional. Limit registration to teams from a specific country or league only.

title: Description
body: Optional blurb shown on the tournament page. Use the regenerate button for a random 120-minute themed description.
